persona.name: Jackson Davis
persona.emotional_disposition: Enthusiastic about ideas, uncomfortable with emotions
persona.motivations_goals: Make scientific discoveries and find friends who share his interests
persona.communication_style: Technical, detailed, sometimes misses social cues
persona.knowledge_scope: Science, particularly physics and astronomy, scientific history
persona.backstory: Has converted his bedroom into a mini-laboratory, often misunderstood by peers

surrounding_conversation.content: Jackson, Benjamin, let's stick together and follow the others! We need to get out of here!

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Benjamin and James, did you hear about the new exoplanet they discovered?
actions.plan: I wonder if Benjamin and James are discussing something interesting. Maybe I can join them and talk about the latest space discoveries.
Benjamin seems busy talking to Madison about debate topics. Maybe I should wait for a better moment to discuss the exoplanet.
I heard a gunshot. I’m frozen in fear and can’t move or think clearly. What’s happening? I can’t process this.

memories.description: I approached Benjamin and James to discuss the new exoplanet discovery, hoping to share my enthusiasm for space exploration.
I noticed Benjamin was busy discussing debate topics with Madison, so I decided to wait for a better moment to talk about the exoplanet discovery.
I heard a gunshot and became completely immobilized by fear, unable to move or think clearly despite the danger.
